headerDisplay: Surfaces Tesla solar production, Powerwall state, and grid flow to Apple Home via the Tesla Owner API.
footerDisplay: Obtain a refresh_token using a tool like https://github.com/adriankumpf/tesla_auth (run it once, sign in with your Tesla account, and copy the refresh_token). The plugin rotates and stores it automatically.

refreshToken.title: Tesla Refresh Token
refreshToken.description: Long string starting with 'eyJ...' or similar, obtained via tesla_auth or another OAuth helper.

siteId.title: Energy Site ID (optional)
siteId.description: Numeric site ID. Leave blank to auto-detect from your account.

pollIntervalSeconds.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.description: 5 minutes is a reasonable default; the Owner API does not publish hard rate limits but is shared with the Tesla mobile app.
